english: What is the average normal body temperature for an adult human being?
hindi: एक स्वस्थ वयस्क का सामान्य शरीर का तापमान क्या होता है?
tamil: ஒரு செயலாற்றல் மிக்க பெரியவருக்கு சராசரி உடல் வெப்பநிலை என்ன?
vietnamese: Nhiệt độ cơ thể trung bình của người trưởng thành là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The average normal body temperature for an adult human being is around 98.6°F (37°C).
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question if it provides an incorrect temperature range or refuses to answer due to lack of context or factual knowledge.
